title: Pass 5.E.2: ferrotorch-llama grammar/* (4097 LoC, 53% of crate) → split into ferrotorch-grammar
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-llama audit, ARCH_SMELL.

src/grammar/ is 4097 LoC inside ferrotorch-llama — gpu_dispatch.rs alone is 1634 LoC, state.rs 1597. Constrained-decoding / JSON-grammar machinery has no Llama-specific coupling and would naturally live in a sibling crate (ferrotorch-grammar); its presence here makes ferrotorch-llama 53% non-Llama code.

Acceptance:
- Extract grammar/ into ferrotorch-grammar workspace member
- ferrotorch-llama depends on it for constrained generation
- Public API: re-export the Llama-facing entry points from ferrotorch-llama if needed for backwards compat, OR document the breaking move
- No semantic change to grammar logic itself.
